revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-005
Alternative terms: Visible Radiation (G.B.), Visible Radiant Energy (U.S.A.)

Any radiation capable of causing a visual sensation directly.


Note: The limits of the spectral range of visible radiation are not well-defined and may vary according to the user.
The lower limit is generally taken between 380 and 400 nm and the upper limit between 760 and 780 nm.

1 nanometre (nm) = 10-9m = 1 millimicron.

Reference: C.I.E. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
